text: The campus library will remain open until midnight during the final examination week.
translation_zh: 期末考试周期间，校园图书馆将开放至午夜。

text: Students must submit their research proposals before the department meeting on Friday.
translation_zh: 学生必须在周五的系部会议前提交研究计划书。

text: Professor Lee canceled the morning lecture because his flight was unexpectedly delayed.
translation_zh: 李教授取消了上午的讲座，因为他的航班意外延误了。

text: Our study group meets in the science building every Wednesday after lunch.
translation_zh: 我们的学习小组每周三午饭后在科学楼见面。

text: The university offers free language courses to all international exchange students.
translation_zh: 这所大学为所有国际交换生提供免费的语言课程。

text: Mia borrowed a laptop from the media center for her class presentation.
translation_zh: 米娅从媒体中心借了一台笔记本电脑，用于课堂展示。

text: The new student club plans to organize a charity concert next month.
translation_zh: 新成立的学生社团计划下个月组织一场慈善音乐会。

text: Please return the laboratory equipment to its proper place after each experiment.
translation_zh: 每次实验后，请将实验室设备放回正确的位置。

text: Several classmates volunteered to guide visitors around the campus on open day.
translation_zh: 几名同学自愿在校园开放日带领访客参观校园。

text: Daniel missed the registration deadline and had to choose another course.
translation_zh: 丹尼尔错过了选课截止日期，只好选择另一门课程。

text: The history assignment requires interviews with two residents from the local community.
translation_zh: 历史作业要求采访当地社区的两位居民。

text: A quiet room is available downstairs for students preparing for job interviews.
translation_zh: 楼下有一间安静的房间，供准备求职面试的学生使用。

text: The cafeteria introduced more vegetarian dishes after receiving feedback from students.
translation_zh: 学生提出意见后，食堂增加了更多素食菜品。

text: We compared three articles before selecting a topic for our group report.
translation_zh: 我们比较了三篇文章，然后才为小组报告选定主题。

text: The scholarship committee will announce its final decision early next semester.
translation_zh: 奖学金委员会将在下学期初公布最终决定。

text: Nora takes detailed notes whenever the instructor explains a difficult concept.
translation_zh: 每当老师讲解一个困难概念时，诺拉都会做详细笔记。

text: Freshmen attended a safety workshop before moving into the university dormitories.
translation_zh: 大一新生在搬进大学宿舍前参加了安全讲座。

text: The basketball team practices outdoors unless the weather becomes too cold.
translation_zh: 除非天气变得太冷，否则篮球队都在户外训练。

text: My academic adviser suggested taking fewer classes while working part time.
translation_zh: 我的学业导师建议我在兼职期间少选几门课。

text: Anyone interested in the debate competition should sign up at the student office.
translation_zh: 有意参加辩论赛的人应到学生办公室报名。

text: The chemistry professor used a simple example to explain the complex reaction.
translation_zh: 化学教授用一个简单的例子解释了复杂的反应。

text: Because the printer was broken, Alice emailed her essay directly to the teacher.
translation_zh: 由于打印机坏了，爱丽丝把论文直接通过电子邮件发给了老师。

text: An experienced graduate shared practical advice about managing stress and deadlines.
translation_zh: 一位经验丰富的毕业生分享了管理压力和截止日期的实用建议。

text: The art exhibition features paintings created by students from different majors.
translation_zh: 这次艺术展展出了不同专业学生创作的画作。

text: Our teacher encouraged us to question information instead of accepting it immediately.
translation_zh: 老师鼓励我们质疑信息，而不是立刻接受它。

text: I usually prepare breakfast at home because the nearby cafe is expensive.
translation_zh: 我通常在家准备早餐，因为附近的咖啡馆很贵。

text: The last bus leaves the town center at ten thirty every evening.
translation_zh: 末班公交车每晚十点半从市中心发车。

text: Could you pick up some fresh fruit on your way home?
translation_zh: 你回家的路上能买些新鲜水果吗？

text: Our neighbors offered to feed the cat while we were away.
translation_zh: 我们外出期间，邻居主动提出帮忙喂猫。

text: Ben saved money for several months before buying his new bicycle.
translation_zh: 本攒了几个月的钱才买下新自行车。

text: The repair shop promised to fix my washing machine by Tuesday afternoon.
translation_zh: 维修店承诺在周二下午前修好我的洗衣机。

text: We changed our picnic plans after dark clouds appeared over the park.
translation_zh: 公园上空出现乌云后，我们改变了野餐计划。

text: Lucy keeps a shopping list on her phone to avoid unnecessary purchases.
translation_zh: 露西把购物清单存在手机里，以免购买不必要的东西。

text: This restaurant becomes extremely busy when nearby offices close for lunch.
translation_zh: 附近办公室午休时，这家餐厅会变得非常忙碌。

text: My sister learned to bake bread by watching free online videos.
translation_zh: 我姐姐通过观看免费的在线视频学会了烤面包。

text: The landlord replaced the old windows to keep the apartment warmer.
translation_zh: 房东更换了旧窗户，以便让公寓更暖和。

text: A street market near the station sells vegetables from local farms.
translation_zh: 车站附近的街市出售本地农场种植的蔬菜。

text: We arrived early enough to find seats beside the train window.
translation_zh: 我们到得够早，找到了火车窗边的座位。

text: Emma lent me an umbrella when heavy rain started without warning.
translation_zh: 大雨毫无预兆地开始时，艾玛借给我一把伞。

text: The community center provides dance classes for children and older adults.
translation_zh: 社区中心为儿童和老年人开设舞蹈课程。

text: Please check the train schedule before leaving for the station tomorrow.
translation_zh: 明天去车站之前，请先查看列车时刻表。

text: My parents prefer quiet seaside towns to crowded tourist cities.
translation_zh: 比起拥挤的旅游城市，我父母更喜欢安静的海滨小镇。

text: The delivery driver called because he could not find our building.
translation_zh: 快递司机因为找不到我们的大楼而打来了电话。

text: Keeping the receipt makes returning an unsuitable product much easier.
translation_zh: 保留收据会让退掉不合适的商品容易得多。

text: George invited several friends over to watch the football match together.
translation_zh: 乔治邀请了几位朋友到家里一起看足球比赛。

text: The morning traffic was lighter than usual because schools were closed.
translation_zh: 因为学校停课，早晨的交通比平时畅通。

text: I found a useful bookshelf at a secondhand furniture store downtown.
translation_zh: 我在市中心一家二手家具店找到了一只有用的书架。

text: After dinner, we walked along the river and discussed our holiday plans.
translation_zh: 晚饭后，我们沿河散步并讨论了假期计划。

text: The hotel receptionist recommended a small museum within walking distance.
translation_zh: 酒店前台推荐了一家步行即可到达的小博物馆。

text: Regular cleaning prevents dust from collecting behind large household appliances.
translation_zh: 定期清洁可以防止灰尘积聚在大型家电后面。

text: Local officials announced a new recycling program for apartment buildings yesterday.
translation_zh: 当地官员昨天宣布了一项面向公寓楼的新回收计划。

text: Heavy snow forced the regional airport to cancel twelve morning flights.
translation_zh: 大雪迫使该地区机场取消了十二个早班航班。

text: The city council approved funding for two additional public libraries.
translation_zh: 市议会批准了建设两座新公共图书馆的资金。

text: A recent survey shows that fewer young people watch traditional television.
translation_zh: 最近的一项调查显示，观看传统电视的年轻人减少了。

text: Farmers welcomed the weekend rain after several weeks of dry weather.
translation_zh: 经历数周干旱天气后，农民们很欢迎周末的降雨。

text: The railway company plans to add more trains during the national holiday.
translation_zh: 铁路公司计划在国庆假期增开列车。

text: Scientists discovered that the coastal bird population increased again this spring.
translation_zh: 科学家发现，沿海鸟类的数量今年春天再次增加。

text: A popular music festival attracted thousands of visitors to the small town.
translation_zh: 一场受欢迎的音乐节吸引了数千名游客来到这座小镇。

text: The mayor opened a public garden designed for families and wheelchair users.
translation_zh: 市长为一座面向家庭和轮椅使用者设计的公共花园揭幕。

text: Food prices remained stable despite higher transportation costs last month.
translation_zh: 尽管运输成本上升，上个月食品价格仍保持稳定。

text: The local newspaper launched a weekly section written entirely by teenagers.
translation_zh: 当地报纸推出了一个完全由青少年撰写的每周专栏。

text: An international film event will bring thirty directors to the capital.
translation_zh: 一项国际电影活动将吸引三十位导演来到首都。

text: Bus passengers can now pay their fares with mobile phones.
translation_zh: 公交乘客现在可以用手机支付车费。

text: Researchers reported cleaner river water following stricter rules for nearby factories.
translation_zh: 研究人员报告称，对附近工厂实施更严格规定后，河水变得更清洁了。

text: The museum received a valuable collection from a retired history teacher.
translation_zh: 博物馆收到了一位退休历史教师捐赠的珍贵藏品。

text: Strong winds damaged several trees but caused no serious travel problems.
translation_zh: 强风损坏了几棵树，但没有造成严重的出行问题。

text: A new report recommends safer bicycle routes around busy shopping areas.
translation_zh: 一份新报告建议在繁忙购物区周围设置更安全的自行车路线。

text: Tourism created hundreds of seasonal jobs in the mountain region.
translation_zh: 旅游业在山区创造了数百个季节性工作岗位。

text: The national weather service expects temperatures to rise by Thursday.
translation_zh: 国家气象部门预计气温将在周四前回升。

text: Residents planted five hundred trees as part of an environmental campaign.
translation_zh: 居民们栽种了五百棵树，作为一项环保活动的一部分。

text: The government opened an online service for renewing travel documents.
translation_zh: 政府开通了在线服务，供人们更新旅行证件。

text: Local shops reported stronger sales during this year's winter holiday.
translation_zh: 当地商店报告称，今年寒假期间销售额有所增长。

text: A rare flower has returned to the valley after a long absence.
translation_zh: 一种罕见的花在消失很久后重新出现在山谷中。

text: Organizers postponed the outdoor ceremony because of possible thunderstorms.
translation_zh: 由于可能出现雷暴，组织者推迟了户外仪式。

text: The town's oldest theater reopened after a year of careful repairs.
translation_zh: 经过一年的精心修缮，这座镇上最古老的剧院重新开放了。

text: Our manager asked everyone to share ideas for improving customer service.
translation_zh: 经理请大家分享改善客户服务的想法。

text: The company provides flexible hours for employees with young children.
translation_zh: 公司为有年幼子女的员工提供弹性工作时间。

text: Rachel prepared a short report before meeting the new business partner.
translation_zh: 瑞秋在会见新的商业伙伴前准备了一份简短报告。

text: A clear subject line helps busy colleagues understand an email quickly.
translation_zh: 清晰的邮件主题能帮助忙碌的同事迅速了解邮件内容。

text: The sales team exceeded its monthly target for the first time.
translation_zh: 销售团队首次超过了月度目标。

text: Employees discussed the office move during a brief online meeting.
translation_zh: 员工们在一次简短的线上会议中讨论了办公室搬迁。

text: Mark accepted an internship to gain practical experience in marketing.
translation_zh: 马克接受了一份实习工作，以获得市场营销方面的实践经验。

text: The receptionist arranged a taxi for the visitors after the conference.
translation_zh: 会议结束后，接待员为来访者安排了一辆出租车。

text: We need accurate figures before making a decision about the project.
translation_zh: 在对项目作出决定之前，我们需要准确的数据。

text: The factory reduced packaging waste by changing the shape of its boxes.
translation_zh: 这家工厂通过改变包装盒的形状减少了包装废弃物。

text: My supervisor praised the presentation but suggested a clearer conclusion.
translation_zh: 我的主管表扬了这次展示，但建议采用更清晰的结论。

text: Several applicants arrived early to complete forms before their interviews.
translation_zh: 几位应聘者提前到达，以便在面试前填写表格。

text: The restaurant hired two extra cooks for the busy summer season.
translation_zh: 这家餐厅为繁忙的夏季增聘了两名厨师。

text: Good communication can prevent small workplace problems from becoming serious.
translation_zh: 良好的沟通可以防止小的职场问题变得严重。

text: Our department shares one meeting room with the design team.
translation_zh: 我们部门与设计团队共用一间会议室。

text: The training course teaches staff how to handle difficult customer questions.
translation_zh: 这门培训课程教员工如何处理棘手的客户问题。

text: Julia works remotely twice a week to shorten her daily travel time.
translation_zh: 朱莉娅每周远程办公两次，以缩短日常通勤时间。

text: The finance officer checked every receipt before approving the expense claim.
translation_zh: 财务人员在批准报销申请前核对了每张收据。

text: A local engineer developed a cheaper method for storing solar energy.
translation_zh: 一位当地工程师研发了一种成本更低的太阳能储存方法。

text: The team divided the assignment according to each member's strongest skills.
translation_zh: 团队根据每位成员最擅长的技能分配了任务。

text: Please update the shared calendar whenever a client changes an appointment.
translation_zh: 客户更改预约时，请及时更新共享日历。

text: The bookstore owner uses social media to promote weekend events.
translation_zh: 书店老板利用社交媒体宣传周末活动。

text: Annual reviews give workers an opportunity to discuss future career goals.
translation_zh: 年度考核让员工有机会讨论未来的职业目标。

text: We postponed the product launch until the final quality checks were complete.
translation_zh: 我们把产品发布推迟到最终质量检查完成之后。

text: The hotel rewards staff members who receive excellent comments from guests.
translation_zh: 酒店会奖励获得客人好评的员工。

text: This mobile application helps users track their daily water consumption.
translation_zh: 这款手机应用帮助用户记录每日饮水量。

text: The software automatically saves a copy whenever you edit the document.
translation_zh: 每当你编辑文档时，这款软件都会自动保存一个副本。

text: Online maps have made exploring unfamiliar cities much more convenient.
translation_zh: 在线地图让探索陌生城市方便了许多。

text: Remember to create a strong password for your new email account.
translation_zh: 记得为你的新电子邮件账户设置一个强密码。

text: The smart speaker misunderstood my request because the room was noisy.
translation_zh: 由于房间里很吵，智能音箱误解了我的请求。

text: Engineers are testing a battery that charges fully within ten minutes.
translation_zh: 工程师们正在测试一种能在十分钟内充满电的电池。

text: Video calls allow distant family members to celebrate important moments together.
translation_zh: 视频通话让相隔遥远的家人能够共同庆祝重要时刻。

text: The website displays public transport information in four different languages.
translation_zh: 该网站以四种不同的语言显示公共交通信息。

text: Some farmers use small drones to examine crops across large fields.
translation_zh: 一些农民使用小型无人机检查大片田地里的农作物。

text: Turning off unused devices can reduce both energy costs and waste.
translation_zh: 关闭不用的设备可以减少能源成本和浪费。

text: The latest update improves photo quality on older mobile phones.
translation_zh: 最新的更新提升了旧款手机的照片质量。

text: Children learned basic computer skills by designing their own simple games.
translation_zh: 孩子们通过设计自己的简单游戏学习了基础电脑技能。

text: Digital tickets reduce waiting time at the entrance to popular attractions.
translation_zh: 电子票可以减少在热门景点入口处的等候时间。

text: The online store recommends products based on a customer's browsing history.
translation_zh: 这家网店会根据顾客的浏览记录推荐商品。

text: A portable solar panel can charge phones during long camping trips.
translation_zh: 便携式太阳能板可以在长途露营期间给手机充电。

text: The robot carries heavy supplies between different parts of the hospital.
translation_zh: 这台机器人在医院的不同区域之间运送沉重物资。

text: Users can adjust the screen brightness to protect their eyes at night.
translation_zh: 用户可以调节屏幕亮度，以保护夜间用眼。

text: Modern weather tools give farmers earlier warnings about sudden storms.
translation_zh: 现代气象工具能让农民更早收到突发暴风雨的预警。

text: The university stores old photographs in a searchable digital collection.
translation_zh: 这所大学把老照片保存在一个可检索的数字馆藏中。

text: Public charging stations are becoming common in airports and shopping centers.
translation_zh: 公共充电站在机场和购物中心正变得越来越常见。

text: Voice technology makes smartphones easier to use for some older people.
translation_zh: 语音技术让一些老年人更容易使用智能手机。

text: Our teacher explained how false information spreads quickly through social networks.
translation_zh: 老师解释了虚假信息如何通过社交网络迅速传播。

text: The device measures room temperature and controls the heating system automatically.
translation_zh: 该设备测量室温并自动控制供暖系统。

text: A damaged cable was responsible for the slow internet connection.
translation_zh: 一根损坏的线缆导致了网速缓慢。

text: Many museums now offer virtual tours for people unable to travel.
translation_zh: 许多博物馆现在为无法出行的人提供虚拟参观。

text: A short walk after dinner can improve sleep and reduce stress.
translation_zh: 晚饭后短暂散步可以改善睡眠并减轻压力。

text: Doctors advise office workers to stretch regularly during long periods of sitting.
translation_zh: 医生建议办公室职员久坐期间定期伸展身体。

text: Eating a balanced breakfast helps children concentrate better at school.
translation_zh: 吃营养均衡的早餐有助于孩子在学校更好地集中注意力。

text: The health center offers free eye tests every Tuesday morning.
translation_zh: 健康中心每周二上午提供免费视力检查。

text: Sarah carries a water bottle to remember to drink throughout the day.
translation_zh: 萨拉随身带着水瓶，提醒自己全天都要喝水。

text: Too much screen time before bed may disturb a person's sleep.
translation_zh: 睡前使用屏幕时间过长可能会影响人的睡眠。

text: Regular exercise can raise energy levels even during a busy week.
translation_zh: 即使在忙碌的一周里，规律锻炼也能提高精力水平。

text: The nurse showed patients how to use the medicine safely.
translation_zh: 护士向病人示范了如何安全用药。

text: Fresh vegetables provide important nutrients that the human body needs.
translation_zh: 新鲜蔬菜能提供人体所需的重要营养物质。

text: Deep breathing helped Kevin stay calm before his public speech.
translation_zh: 深呼吸帮助凯文在公开演讲前保持冷静。

text: The swimming pool has special morning sessions for older adults.
translation_zh: 游泳池为老年人设置了专门的晨间时段。

text: People often make healthier choices when nutritious food is easily available.
translation_zh: 当营养食品很容易获得时，人们通常会作出更健康的选择。

text: A comfortable chair can prevent back pain during long study sessions.
translation_zh: 舒适的椅子可以防止长时间学习时出现背痛。

text: The doctor recommended resting at home and drinking plenty of warm water.
translation_zh: 医生建议在家休息并多喝温水。

text: Joining a sports club helped Anna make friends and remain active.
translation_zh: 参加体育俱乐部帮助安娜结交朋友并保持活力。

text: Reading food labels allows shoppers to compare sugar and salt levels.
translation_zh: 阅读食品标签能让购物者比较糖和盐的含量。

text: The local clinic recently added evening appointments for working parents.
translation_zh: 当地诊所最近为在职父母增设了晚间预约。

text: Spending time outdoors can improve both physical and mental well-being.
translation_zh: 花时间进行户外活动可以改善身心健康。

text: My grandfather follows a simple exercise program designed by his doctor.
translation_zh: 我祖父遵循一套由医生设计的简单锻炼计划。

text: Washing hands carefully reduces the spread of common seasonal illnesses.
translation_zh: 认真洗手可以减少常见季节性疾病的传播。

text: The coach reminded runners to warm up before starting the race.
translation_zh: 教练提醒跑步者在比赛开始前进行热身。

text: Healthy sleep habits are easier to maintain with a regular schedule.
translation_zh: 有规律的作息更有助于保持健康的睡眠习惯。

text: Several employees chose stairs instead of elevators during a fitness challenge.
translation_zh: 在一次健身挑战中，几名员工选择走楼梯而不是乘电梯。

text: The community garden gives residents access to affordable fresh produce.
translation_zh: 社区菜园让居民能够获得价格实惠的新鲜农产品。

text: Taking brief breaks improves attention when a task requires hours of concentration.
translation_zh: 当一项任务需要长时间集中注意力时，短暂休息可以提高专注度。
